chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-202 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 27.05.2025 Mr. Ayaz Hussain Kalhoro, Advocate for the Petitioner a/w Petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh assisted by Aftab Ahmed Bhutto, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh a/w Rashid Rehman, Assistant Director, Local Government Department on behalf of Regional Director, Local Government Department, Larkano Division, Javed Ahmed Shahani, Chairman and Riaz Hussain Detho, Secretary, Union Council, Akil. ------ Pursuant to directions, Javed Ahmed Shahani, Chairman and Riaz Hussain Detho, Secretary, Union Council, Akil are present and place on record Cheque bearing No.53548718, dated 26.05.2025, amounting to Rs.28,444/- in favour of Petitioner Ghulam Nabi Khuhro alongwith set of documents, taken on record. The original cheque has been handed over to the petitioner against his acknowledgment. The Chairman, U.C Akil undertakes to pay Rs. 100,000/- from the arrears so also monthly pension to the petitioner on 5th of each month right from month of June, 2025 onwards without causing any negligence or delay and seeks disposal of the petition. Counsel for the petitioner when confronted with the above statement and upon receipt of the cheque produced by Chairman, U.C. Akil has no objection for disposal of the petition; however, submits that in case they may cause hindrance or avoid to make payment to the petitioner in future, the petitioner may be permitted to file a proper application against them.

Counsel for the petitioner when confronted with the above statement and upon receipt of the cheque produced by Chairman, U.C. Akil has no objection for disposal of the petition; however, submits that in case they may cause hindrance or avoid to make payment to the petitioner in future, the petitioner may be permitted to file a proper application against them. Learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh has no objection. Accordingly and in view of above and subject to all just legal exceptions, the petition in hand is hereby disposed of. Judge Judge Manzoor
